issues.description: Condition should check if Leader has {Navy} type, not if Leader exists on board. Should be LeaderHasType:Navy
TrashFromHand action is optional ("You may") but DSL shows it as mandatory. Missing optional flag or restructuring needed

Rest action targets opponent's characters and should prevent attack, but Rest doesn't convey the duration restriction (cannot attack until end of opponent's next End Phase). This requires a GiveKeyword action with CannotAttack keyword and proper duration tracking
Target scope is wrong: should be ChooseOpponentCharacter with maxCount:2 and maxPower:10000, not just maxPower filter
Second effect is completely unrelated to card text. References ReturnToHand and ChooseOwnCharacter with maxCost:5, which do not appear in the official card effect. This should be removed entirely
